0.description: User picks up Magnesium with Tongs

microView.description: Mg loses electrons to Oxygen, forming ionic lattice

visuals: Bubbles moving through tube to gas jar
Silver sodium pellet darting on water surface
Immediate formation of cloudy white precipitate
Color change in flask (e.g., Pink to Colorless if using Phenolphthalein)
Blue solution slowly turning pale green
Water vapor condensing on cold surface (optional)
Red litmus turning blue at mouth of tube due to ammonia gas
